meaning: adj.未成文的,口头的,没有记录的,不成文的
examples: Without unwritten rules civilized life would be impossible.
They obey the one unwritten rule that binds them all–no talking.
The photographs were to be included in his as yet unwritten autobiography.
The unwritten rule is that business is conducted in the public sector from Monday to Thursday.
The Navy Seals usually respect an unwritten code of staying out of the public eye.
